title: acalypha pygmaea
intro: Acalypha pygmaea, also known as Dwarf Copper Leaf or Small Copper Leaf, is a small shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae, native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acalypha pygmaea include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use in treating fever and respiratory issues. Acalypha pygmaea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
